title: schoenoplectus lacustris
intro: Schoenoplectus lacustris, also known as Common Club-rush or Lake Club-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Schoenoplectus lacustris is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
